en_title: Valve: RAM Companies State Prices Monthly, ‘If We Say No, Then They Never Talk to Us Again’
cn_title: Valve自曝在内存采购上毫无议价权
subtitle: 不买就断交
opus_summary: 在AI囤货潮下，Valve坦承内存采购毫无议价权，厂商按月定价且拒绝即断交。最终Steam Machine定价1049美元(约合人民币7123元)，虽贵但仍被IGN视为最易入门的PC游戏设备。

paragraphs.en: In a new interview, Valve has conceded it has no bargaining power when it comes to buying memory from the limited number of companies that produce it at scale and control the bulk of the market. The company explained that doing anything other than agreeing to the price offered would see Valve cut off entirely.
paragraphs.cn: 在一则新采访中，Valve承认，在向为数不多的大规模生产并控制市场主要份额的内存厂商采购时，它毫无议价能力。公司解释称，除了接受对方报价，任何其他举动都可能导致Valve被彻底断绝供应。

paragraphs.en: The explosive growth of the AI industry has come with gluttonous demand from AI businesses hoarding the same memory components that consumer electronics need. As demand outpaces supply, prices have shot up sharply.
paragraphs.cn: AI行业的爆炸式增长导致AI企业大量囤积与消费电子产品相同的存储组件，需求激增。由于需求超过供应，价格急剧攀升。

paragraphs.en: For its part, Valve explained that it has not secured contracts for memory components.
paragraphs.cn: Valve自身则解释称，它并未签订内存组件的长期合同。

paragraphs.en: “Look, there’s no contract; there’s nothing,” Valve engineer Pierre-Loup Griffais told Gamers Nexus. “Like, those guys… they give us a price every month, or something, and they say, ‘You can buy that many, and it’s yes or no.’ And if we say no, then they never talk to us again.”
paragraphs.cn: 「瞧，没有合同，什么也没有，」Valve工程师Pierre-Loup Griffais告诉Gamers Nexus，「那些家伙……他们每月给我们报价一次，大概这样，然后说『你们可以买这么多，行还是不行』。如果我们拒绝，他们就再也不会联系我们了。」

paragraphs.en: While Valve hasn’t been forthcoming with a precise figure, it’s estimated that the Steam Machine was probably originally going to cost somewhere around USD $750 before rocketing RAM costs ruled that out and led to the final USD $1049 price tag.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然Valve没有透露确切数字，但据估计，Steam Machine最初定价可能约为750美元(约合人民币5092元)，但由于内存成本飙升而取消，最终定价为1049美元(约合人民币7123元)。

paragraphs.en: Valve’s new Steam Machine is far from the only consumer device feeling the pinch of RAM prices. Both Sony and Xbox continue to express concern over the significant challenges of launching new consoles amid such unprecedented demand for memory and storage chips, and
paragraphs.cn: Valve的新Steam Machine远非唯一感受到内存价格压力的消费设备。索尼和XBOX也持续对在当前这种内存和存储芯片需求空前高涨之际推出新主机所面临的巨大挑战表示担忧，并且

paragraphs.en: However, while the Steam Machine’s price stings – and remains “a bit too expensive to take on the PS5 or the Xbox Series X” – IGN’s review noted Valve’s approachable new living room device remains easy to recommend as it’s “almost certainly the easiest way to get into PC gaming right now.”
paragraphs.cn: 不过，尽管Steam Machine的价格令人肉疼——并且仍「比PS5或XBOX Series贵了一些」——但IGN的评测指出，Valve这款平易近人的新客厅设备仍然值得推荐，因为它「几乎肯定是目前最容易进入PC游戏的方式。

paragraphs.en: You can learn more about the Steam Machine’s price and performance in IGN’s recent interview with Valve.
paragraphs.cn: 你可以在IGN近期对Valve的采访中了解有关Steam Machine价格和性能的更多信息。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的资深编辑。你可以在Bluesky上找到他@mrlukereilly，向他询问各种事情。
